LOGIN.SUBTITLE: Log in to answer questionnaires
LOGIN.ERROR_GENERAL: An error occurred during login. Please try again.

ERRORS.ACCOUNT_DISABLED: Your account has been disabled. Please contact your administrator.
ERRORS.ACCOUNT_EXPIRED: Your account has expired. Please contact your administrator.
ERRORS.PASSWORD_EXPIRED: Your password has expired. You must change your password at next logon.
ERRORS.ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Your account has been locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please contact your administrator.
ERRORS.ACCOUNT_LOGIN_ERROR: A login error occurred with your account. Please contact your administrator.
ERRORS.GENERIC_AD_ERROR: Your account has been locked or disabled. Please contact your administrator for assistance.
ERRORS.NETWORK: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection.
ERRORS.SERVER: A server error occurred. Please try again later.
ERRORS.GENERIC: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
ERRORS.BAD_REQUEST: Invalid request. Please check your input.
ERRORS.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again.
ERRORS.TIMEOUT: Request timed out. Please try again.
ERRORS.REQUIRED_FIELDS: Please fill in all required fields.

HOME.LOGIN_SUCCESS: You have successfully logged in to the system.
